entries.definition:
كتاب الجيم

جث - جحد

(جحد) الجيم والحاء والدال أصلٌ يدلُّ على قِلّة الخير. يُقال عامٌ جَحِدٌ قليل المطر. ورجل جَحِْدٌ فقير، وقد جَحِدَ وأَجْحَدَ. قال ابن دُريد: والجَحْد من كلِّ شيءٍ القِلّة. قال الشاعر:

* ولَنْ يَرَى ما عاش إلاّ جَحْدا *

45, Meccan sura, so-named because of the reference in verse 28 to the ‘kneeling posture’ of all on the Day of Judgement.
جِثِيّ jithiyy [pl. of act. part. جَاثٍ jāthī] kneeling down, humbled, vanquished (19:68) فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَالشَّيَاطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا so by your Lord We shall gather them together with the devils, and then set them around Hell, kneeling.
entries.definition_english:
45, Meccan sura, so-named because of the reference in verse 28 to the ‘kneeling posture’ of all on the Day of Judgement.
جِثِيّ jithiyy [pl. of act. part. جَاثٍ jāthī] kneeling down, humbled, vanquished (19:68) فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَالشَّيَاطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا so by your Lord We shall gather them together with the devils, and then set them around Hell, kneeling.

entries.definition:
j–ḥ–d barren land, stifled plants, (of plants) to fail to grow properly; to deny, to disown, to reject; to become penniless, paucity. Of this root, جَحَدَ jaḥada occurs 12 times in the Qurʾan.
جَحَدَ jaḥada a [v. trans. and intrans. occurring with or without بِـ] to absolutely reject, give the lie to or categorically deny (something whilst knowing or not knowing it to be true) (27:14) وَجَحَدُوا بِهَا وَاسْتَيْقَنَتْهَا أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا they denied them absolutely, out of wickedness and arrogance, even though their souls acknowledged them as true.
entries.definition_english:
j–ḥ–d barren land, stifled plants, (of plants) to fail to grow properly; to deny, to disown, to reject; to become penniless, paucity. Of this root, جَحَدَ jaḥada occurs 12 times in the Qurʾan.
جَحَدَ jaḥada a [v. trans. and intrans. occurring with or without بِـ] to absolutely reject, give the lie to or categorically deny (something whilst knowing or not knowing it to be true) (27:14) وَجَحَدُوا بِهَا وَاسْتَيْقَنَتْهَا أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا they denied them absolutely, out of wickedness and arrogance, even though their souls acknowledged them as true.
